flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Washington-Seattle Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Washington-Seattle Campus are 27% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($78.5k vs $61.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Washington-Seattle Campus rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 (47.7% → 53.9%).
